prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该科类最低位次分别为约7637→8579→13252→20584→21165名，整体呈持续后移趋势，近4年累计后移约13528名；但2024至2025年增幅明显收窄（仅增5 81名），显示位次后移势头趋缓，2025年基准约21165名；该校在山西省物理类招生计划：2021–2023年均为50人，2024年48人，2025年45人，呈逐年小幅缩减；2026年计划47人，较2025年增加2人（扩招约4.4%），扩招使竞争略有缓和，位次数字有增大倾向。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 天津医科大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科主榜 排名约第60名（2026年），是独立医科大学中唯一一所211，层次稳固，对考生有持续吸引力；近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情事件；抖音热度总排名第78位 （评价"一般"），短视频曝光量中等，未出现爆冷或断档信号，报考心理较为理性；但该校临床医学、口腔医学、基础医学等 专业在医学领域享有较高声誉，对高分考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学、口腔医学、电子信息/通信等专业持续高热推荐，医学类专业报考热度居高不下；山西省2026年物理类考生约167419人，较2025年173347人减少约5928人（-3.4%），考生规模小幅缩减，竞争略有缓和；天津医科大学位于天津市，属外省招生，对山西考生无本省保护效应。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次21165名、2026年物理 类计划扩招约4.4%、本省物理类考生减少约3.4%以及医学类专业持续高热等因素，扩招与考生减少共同使竞争略有缓和，但学校层次优势和医学热度对位次形成支撑。预测2026年 最低位次约21759名，区间21259–22259名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for this subject category were approximately 7637 → 8579 → 13252 → 20584 → 21165, showing a continuous backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 13528 positions over the past 4 years; however, the increase from 2024 to 2025 narrowed significantly (only 581 positions), indicating a slowing trend in ranking decline, with a baseline of about 21165 in 2025; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Shanxi Province: 50 students each year from 2021 to 2023, 48 in 2024, 45 in 2025, showing a gradual slight reduction; the 2026 plan is 47 students, an increase of 2 students (about 4.4% expansion) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition and tends to increase the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tianjin Medical University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranking about 60th on the Soft Science Main Ranking (2026), and is the only 211 among independent medical universities, with a stable level that continues to attract candidates; its reputation has been stable in recent years, with no obvious negative public opinion incidents; its Douyin popularity ranks 78th overall (rated 'average'), with moderate short video exposure, no signs of cold surprises or gaps, and a relatively rational application psychology; however, its clinical medicine, stomatology, basic medicine and other majors enjoy high reputations in the medical field, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical medicine, stomatology, electronic information/communication and other majors continue to be highly recommended, with medical majors maintaining high application enthusiasm; in 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Shanxi Province is about 167,419, a decrease of about 5,928 (3.4%) from 173,347 in 2025, with a slight reduction in candidate scale, easing competition slightly; Tianjin Medical University is located in Tianjin City, recruiting from other provinces, with no local protection effect for Shanxi candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 21165, the 2026 Physics Category enrollment expansion of about 4.4%, the reduction of local Physics Category candidates by about 3.4%, and the sustained high popularity of medical majors, the combined effect of expansion and candidate reduction slightly eases competition, but the university's level advantage and medical popularity support the ranking. The predicted 2026 minimum ranking is about 21759, with a range of 21259–22259.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 21259–22259, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Clinical Medicine, Anesthesiology, Ophthalmology and Optometry Medicine, etc.), use Tier 1 flagship majors (5+3 Integrated Programs) as reach targets, and Tier 3 majors (Pharmacy, Nursing, etc.) as safe backups. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 long-cycle clinical/stomatology majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2024, the minimum rank for liberal arts was approximately 3041 (Public Administration). In 2025, the minimum rank for history category was approximately 19461 (Nursing, with Chemistry as a re-selected subject). The rank has significantly shifted backward over the two years, mainly due to the addition of the Nursing major (with Chemistry as a re-selected subject) in 2025, which lowered the overall threshold. The 2025 baseline is approximately 19461. In 2025, the history category plan enrolled 5 students (3 for Public Administration + 2 for Nursing). In 2026, the history category plan enrolls 3 students (only Public Administration), a decrease of 2 students (40% reduction) compared to 2025. The reduction is substantial, leading to intensified competition and a tendency for the rank number to decrease.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tianjin Medical University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranking approximately 60th on the Soft Science main list, with a stable level. In recent years, its reputation has been stable with no obvious negative public opinion. Its popularity on Douyin is average, with no signs of a cold upset.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the number of history category examinees in Shanxi Province is approximately 63,113, a decrease of about 21,766 (25.6%) from 84,879 in 2025. The examinee pool has significantly shrunk, leading to a notable easing of competition. Tianjin Medical University is located in Tianjin City, which is an out-of-province enrollment for Shanxi, with no provincial protection effect for Shanxi candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline rank of 19,461, the 40% reduction in history category enrollment plan for 2026, and the approximately 25.6% decrease in history category examinees in the province, the reduction in enrollment and the decrease in examinees are in opposite directions. However, the magnitude of enrollment reduction (-40%) is greater than the magnitude of examinee reduction (-25.6%), leading to overall intensified competition. The predicted minimum rank for 2026 is approximately 14,770, with a range of 14,270 to 15,270.
